case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC VS LALONDE ELAN

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LALONDE ELAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,408.81 FILED BY BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC AS TO DEFENDANT LALONDE ELAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LALONDE ELAN $1,408.81 PRINCIPAL, $39.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,448.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
